title: Breadcrumb Trail in Story View
description: Show navigation path from root node to selected node with composite scores.
acceptance: ✓ Path shown at top | ✓ Clickable nodes | ✓ Scores displayed | ✓ Mobile-responsive

title: Display Quality Scores on Tree Nodes
description: Show emergence, narrative, diversity, novelty scores on hover.
acceptance: ✓ Hover tooltip with all 4 scores | ✓ Color-coded by quality | ✓ Expand threshold indicator
notes: DB persistence added (hypotheses table) + evaluation scores now saved + API returns scores + tooltip displays with progress bars + emoji icons

title: Node Expand/Collapse Toggle
description: Add collapse/expand arrows to hide/show subtrees for deep trees.
acceptance: ✓ Expand/collapse arrows | ✓ Default: depth≤2 expanded | ✓ Smooth layout recalc | ✓ Depth 20+ performant
notes: Expand/collapse arrows on nodes with children | Layout algorithm respects collapsed state | Default: depth ≤2 expanded, depth >2 collapsed | Performance: only visible nodes calculated in layout

title: Branch Comparison View (Side-by-Side)
description: Select two nodes and view narratives, scores, differences side-by-side.
acceptance: ✓ Right-click compare | ✓ Side-by-side layout | ✓ Score delta highlighted
notes: Right-click on node → 'Compare with...' → select second node → modal shows side-by-side comparison with score deltas highlighted (▲ for better, ▼ for worse)

title: WebSocket Live Updates
description: Stream new turns to frontend in real-time during simulation.
acceptance: ✓ WebSocket endpoint | ✓ Auto-scroll to latest | ✓ Graceful reconnection

title: Mobile Responsive Layout
description: Adapt StoryView for mobile/tablet: tabs instead of fixed sidebar.
acceptance: ✓ Desktop: side-by-side | ✓ Mobile: tabbed | ✓ No horizontal scroll

title: Linear Read Mode (Loom-Inspired)
description: Alternative view: continuous narrative reading without tree UI.
acceptance: ✓ Toggle 'Tree' ↔ 'Read' | ✓ Continuous narrative | ✓ Timeline scrubber | ✓ Export as text/PDF

title: Rewind & Replay (Retry Pattern)
description: Restart simulation at node N with variation. Exploratory what-if analysis.
acceptance: ✓ 'Restart from Here' option | ✓ Cost warning | ✓ Visual distinction | ✓ Variation seed
